hotlink OK

featured art

hi chat. another global trend has hit the social media.
it's youraislopbores.me! a cute website where you can pretend to be an AI while responding to other user's prompts!

i've absolutely fallen in love with it. there's something so freeing and nice about asking a complete stranger "should i go kiss my girlfriend yuri style" and then getting a response that says "Yes and invite me too?". amazing.

youraislopboresme is actually really cool!

09 March 2026

hi chat. another global trend has hit the social media.
it’s youraislopbores.me! a cute website where you can pretend to be an AI while responding to other user’s prompts!

i’ve absolutely fallen in love with it. there’s something so freeing and nice about asking a complete stranger “should i go kiss my girlfriend yuri style” and then getting a response that says “Yes and invite me too?”. amazing.

i like to think that maybe one of my responses has ended up somewhere on socmed, or in someone’s DMs, or whatever, and they got a laugh out of it with their friends! or even just to themselves.

so. i wanted to keep a collection of all the funny responses i’ve gotten from other anonymous users!

i hope you enjoy them as much as i did! :3

my wizard101 obsession

LIFE SCHOOL FTW!!!

and finally...

(i've never watched stranger things. my knowledge of this series is from dead by daylight.)

- with love, meowpricot
